The '''''Kotiate''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
During one supply run, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] attacked with a strike force consisting of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]], [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]], and [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]]. With his ship's systems failing, the captain of the Star Destroyer tried to retreat in a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], but it was also destroyed. The ''[[Bird of Prey]]'' arrived along with [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] in a last desperate attempt to save the Star Destroyer, but they were too late, and the ''Kotiate'' was destroyed by the Rebel forces.
